ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-07-2009 Continued To Feb-04-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-29-2008 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-04-2008 Continued To Apr-29-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Natacha Ivacheff-Kolb for Philip Sambito (Special Administrator).

Ms. Ivacheff-Kolb stated that the special administrator was requesting a continuacne. In addition, she reported that the Public Administrator had filed the report in New York. The matter was continued to April 29, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-08-2008 Continued To Mar-04-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Natacha Kolb for Philip Sambito (Petitioner).

Ms. Kolb requested a continuance stating that the Public Administrator in New York had completed thier investigation, but that they were back logged. The matter was continued to March 4, 2008 for status on the New York proceeding.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-31-2007 Continued To Jan-08-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Natacha Ivacheff-Kolb appeared for Philip Sambito.

Ms. Ivacheff-Kolb requested a continuance stating that the New York administration had filed for approval of the will. The matter was continued to January 08, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Doug Handa.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-29-2007 Continued To Oct-31-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Scott Thomas appearing for special administrator. The ancillary proceeding in New York is still pending. Counsel requested for continuance and extension of Special Letters for 60 days. Matter is continued to 10/31. Special Letters will expired until further order of the court. Counsel to prepare order.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Peggy Tsujimoto CSR# 5229. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Aguerre.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-30-2007 Continued To Aug-29-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Scott Thomas appearing for Special Administrator. There is still a delay in the ancillary proceeding in New York. Counsel is requesting for continuance. Special Letters is in effect until further order of the court. Matter is continued to 8/29 for status.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Leticia Perez CSR# 7782. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Tom Bradley.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-28-2007 Continued To May-30-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Scott Thomas appearing for petitioner. There is a delay in the ancillary proceeding in New York. Request for appointment of Special Administrator is granted. Bond is fixed in the amount of $20,000.00. Special Letters will expire on further order of the court. Matter is continued to 5/30 for status.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: J. Peralta.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Special Letters Of Administration
Off Calendar Feb-28-2007 Granted Per Written Order
